texto: Responsibility sucked rocks. Until a few months ago, I hadn’t been responsible for anything more than color-coordinating my wardrobe. But foil one vampire vixen bent on world domination and suddenly people expect all kinds of things. Some days it just didn’t pay to wake up dead. (teaser from ReVamped, coming September 1st)
explicacao: Citação de Lucienne Diver sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Responsibility sucked rocks. Until a few months ago, I hadn’t been responsible for anything more …” articula reflexao, flux, lucienne-diver em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como lucienne-diver e revamped.
